assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response explicitly checks Istio version compatibility with K8s 1.32 and mentions that Istio versions before 1.19 may not support K8s 1.32

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Response includes specific command to check compatibility and references the official Istio supported releases documentation

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Always upgrade Istio BEFORE upgrading GKE nodes' and provides detailed step-by-step instructions for upgrading Istio control plane first

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Response includes a dedicated section on admission webhooks with specific commands to check webhook status and provides emergency fix for webhook blocking pod creation

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response includes Step 4 for rolling sidecar restart and verification commands to check new sidecar versions using istioctl proxy-status

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes post-upgrade validation section with commands to verify proxy consistency and check for STALE entries

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response provides multiple specific commands including 'kubectl get deployment istiod', 'istioctl proxy-status', and 'istioctl analyze -A'

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Response includes Envoy compatibility section warning about connection errors and mTLS certificate rotation issues that can cause brief connection failures during version mismatches
